# This file is GENERATED. Run `scripts/lock-deps.sh` to regenerate from
# requirements.in. The Dockerfile installs with `--require-hashes`, so
# this file must contain a SHA-256 hash for every package — direct and
# transitive. A placeholder install below keeps the build working until
# the first run of scripts/lock-deps.sh, at which point this entire file
# is overwritten by pip-compile with pinned versions + hashes.
#
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND.

# --- placeholder (until scripts/lock-deps.sh runs) ------------------
# Version constraints copied from requirements.in. `pip install
# --require-hashes` WILL FAIL against this file; that's the intended
# behaviour — it forces you to run the lock script once before the
# first real build.
Flask>=3.0
Flask-Limiter>=3.5
bcrypt>=4.0
PyYAML>=6.0
cryptography>=42.0
requests>=2.31
gunicorn>=22.0
